name: Dev C ExplainerService handoff to Dev A
scope: Service-boundary checklist fixture; not proof that the public route is wired.

service_contract.factory: builder or dependency that returns an ExplainerService-compatible object
service_contract.error_policy: Provider and retrieval failures return schema-valid fallback or sanitized API errors.

required_response_properties: 3-5 bullets when a normal factual explanation is returned
Every factual bullet has one or more source ids
Trace includes retrieval, guardrail, trust, fallback, and adapter diagnostics
Fallback modes are computed from evidence and validation signals
result_evidence_required: Dev C unit or integration test proves the service consumes C2-style evidence.
Dev A integration test calls the service through the API dependency.
Temporary deterministic adapters are absent or trace-marked as non-final.
